[Question]
What could be the possible causes of toothache?

%;">Possible Causes of Toothache:

1. Cavities or Dental Caries

2. Gum Disease

3. Tooth Fracture or Crack

4. Tooth Sensitivity

5. Wisdom Teeth Issues

6. Bruxism (Teeth Grinding)

7. Sinus Infections

8. Acid Erosion

9. Trauma or Injury to the Mouth

10. Dry Mouth

So the possible causes of toothache include cavities or dental caries, gum disease, tooth fracture or crack, tooth sensitivity, wisdom teeth issues, bruxism (teeth grinding), sinus infections, acid erosion, trauma or injury to the mouth, and dry mouth.
